capability: Session-local file creation, editing, packaging, and deletion
conditions: Linux session runtime with /mnt/data workspace
best_fit: Report generation; code/data transformation; archive staging
tradeoffs: Fast and flexible but ephemeral
known_failure_modes: Assuming local existence implies durability
workaround_or_alternative: Explicit artifact handoff; Git/Drive persistence

capability: Shell and Python execution
conditions: Current sandbox tool surface
tradeoffs: Execution call boundaries can interrupt long monolithic commands
known_failure_modes: Long command exceeds call boundary
workaround_or_alternative: Split phases; resume; cache; checkpoint

capability: Native C/C++ compile, link, and execute
conditions: Observed Debian x86_64 CPU runtime
best_fit: Native utilities; extension work; small/medium native projects
tradeoffs: Memory more constraining than visible CPU count
known_failure_modes: Over-parallel build; missing dev headers
workaround_or_alternative: Conservative -j; provision deps through mirrors

capability: Incremental native build/test/debug loop
conditions: CPython pilot; cached build state
tradeoffs: Initial clean bootstrap can be expensive
known_failure_modes: Configure/build interruption; stale mtime/object relationship
workaround_or_alternative: Cached configure; incremental targets; touch/rebuild; preserve logs

capability: Native debugging with GDB
conditions: GDB installed in active runtime; debug-capable binary
tradeoffs: Installed debugger may disappear after runtime reset
known_failure_modes: Assuming installed debugger survives runtime reset
workaround_or_alternative: Runtime health check; reinstall from available mirror; checkpoint debug logs

capability: Long-lived runtime filesystem continuity
conditions: Runtime reset was directly observed
best_fit: None; do not design around this assumption
tradeoffs: Runtime and package state can disappear
known_failure_modes: Treating /mnt/data and installed packages as durable
workaround_or_alternative: Checkpoint early; Git for source state; Drive for raw archives

capability: Selective artifact rehydration after runtime reset
conditions: Observed for individually persisted artifacts in one reset event
tradeoffs: Not recursive; not all large artifacts survived
known_failure_modes: Assuming directory handoff preserves recursive tree
workaround_or_alternative: Persist critical files individually; verify actual durable objects

capability: Python packages through uv and internal PyPI
conditions: Internal PyPI route available
best_fit: Python tooling and targeted scientific dependency closure
tradeoffs: Can diverge from project-declared official environment
known_failure_modes: Wrong base interpreter; dependency version drift
workaround_or_alternative: Pin hashes/versions; record environment; use target overlay or correct interpreter

capability: Native packages through internal Debian binary/source mirrors
conditions: Mirror routes available in tested runtime
best_fit: Native build deps; Debian source packages
tradeoffs: Environment-specific mirror discovery required
known_failure_modes: Public Debian DNS blocked
workaround_or_alternative: Use internal apt/source mirror; capture package versions

capability: Private-prefix source builds
conditions: Source obtainable; manageable dependency closure
best_fit: Small native libraries; isolated custom deps
tradeoffs: Build time and transitive dependency burden
known_failure_modes: Broad closure becomes expensive
workaround_or_alternative: Prefer project fallback/subproject when available; external build environment for large closure

capability: Meson local wraps/subprojects
conditions: Project supports fallback subprojects or staged source archives
best_fit: Meson projects with controlled fallback deps
tradeoffs: Not universal; source acquisition still required
known_failure_modes: Missing system package and no staged wrap
workaround_or_alternative: Pre-stage wrap archive or use internal mirror

capability: Conan with public ConanCenter
conditions: Conan client installable; default public remote was unreachable
best_fit: C/C++ dependency management when private/local cache exists
tradeoffs: Public remote topology can block bootstrap
known_failure_modes: Conan installed but dependency remote unreachable
workaround_or_alternative: Use internal/private Conan remote or staged cache

capability: Conda/micromamba environment bootstrap
conditions: Requires accessible channel, staged packages, or packed env
best_fit: Complex scientific stacks; exact environment portability
tradeoffs: Channel access not demonstrated
known_failure_modes: External channels unreachable
workaround_or_alternative: Use prepacked environment, internal channel, or alternative venv overlay

capability: Spack or Nix bootstrap
conditions: Requires staged mirrors/caches for practical use
tradeoffs: Operationally heavy in restricted network
known_failure_modes: Bootstrap/cache acquisition cost
workaround_or_alternative: Use only when project already has cache/mirror infrastructure

capability: Scientific Python execution and biomolecular structure parsing
conditions: CPU environment; targeted dependency closure
best_fit: Comp bio utilities; data transforms; structure parsing
tradeoffs: Exact official environment parity may differ
known_failure_modes: Package closure/version drift
workaround_or_alternative: Record versions; validate outputs; use external environment when parity is essential

capability: CPU PyTorch model loading and LigandMPNN inference
conditions: Tested model/input; ~4 GiB memory runtime; CPU Torch path
best_fit: Targeted model debugging; small-batch protein design inference
tradeoffs: CPU performance and memory depend strongly on model/input/threading
known_failure_modes: Thread oversubscription; broad dependency bootstrap
workaround_or_alternative: Cap numerical threads; profile RSS; use cluster/GPU for heavy workloads

capability: Thread-capped CPU inference tuning
conditions: Foundry rerun on tested runtime
best_fit: CPU scientific workloads with many visible cores but low memory
tradeoffs: Optimal thread count workload-specific
known_failure_modes: Unconstrained run ~4m43s versus 4-thread ~11.1s in tested case
workaround_or_alternative: Benchmark conservative thread cap before scaling

capability: GPU/CUDA execution in sandbox
conditions: No /dev/dri; no CUDA validation
tradeoffs: Do not infer GPU from host-visible tool names or CPU count
known_failure_modes: Planning GPU workloads around unverified device access
workaround_or_alternative: Use external GPU/cluster; recheck future runtime surface

capability: High-memory model workloads
conditions: Observed runtime ~4 GiB RAM, no swap
tradeoffs: Likely memory-bound
known_failure_modes: OOM risk
workaround_or_alternative: External cluster/GPU/high-memory host; reduce batch/model scope

capability: SLURM/HPC execution directly from sandbox
conditions: No cluster execution path tested
tradeoffs: Authentication, network, scheduler integration unresolved
known_failure_modes: Assuming sandbox replaces HPC environment
workaround_or_alternative: Use external cluster as compute backend; design source/artifact handoff separately

capability: Interactive GUI scientific tools in sandbox
conditions: No GUI path tested
tradeoffs: Interactive display and acceleration unresolved
known_failure_modes: Treating sandbox as desktop workstation
workaround_or_alternative: Use local/remote desktop environment; use sandbox for scripts and headless validation

capability: Text artifact handoff from sandbox to persistent artifact layer
conditions: Assistant-authored sandbox reference; later-turn search publication behavior
tradeoffs: Artifact existence and text search visibility are distinct
known_failure_modes: Creation alone; stdout path; same-turn search expectation
workaround_or_alternative: Explicit sandbox handoff; verify in later turn; keep checksum

capability: Persistent artifact snapshot independence from local overwrite/delete
conditions: Promoted artifact already exists
tradeoffs: Re-referencing same path may involve resolver/cache behavior
known_failure_modes: Assuming promoted object tracks live local path
workaround_or_alternative: Use new path/versioned filename for new snapshot

capability: Google Drive upload of session-generated files
conditions: File must resolve to transferable runtime/connector file reference
best_fit: Emergency off-runtime backup; raw report preservation
tradeoffs: Additional handoff layer; connector surface may change
known_failure_modes: Passing arbitrary raw /mnt/data path directly
workaround_or_alternative: Materialize transferable runtime asset; minimal probe first; verify upload and download

capability: Large archive backup to Google Drive with chunking
conditions: Observed connector relay ceiling ~100 MiB; 64 MiB chunks used
tradeoffs: More files and reassembly metadata; backup folder hygiene needed
known_failure_modes: Single large object rejected by relay ceiling
workaround_or_alternative: Deterministic split; CHUNKS.sha256; reassembly instructions; final hash

capability: Drive raw-download round trip and exact archive recovery
conditions: CPython and Foundry rerun chunk backups
tradeoffs: Extra download and verification cost
known_failure_modes: Upload success mistaken for recoverability
workaround_or_alternative: Raw-download every chunk; hash; reassemble; final SHA; integrity test

capability: Semantic recovery of lost pilot from provenance
conditions: Source/input/checkpoint provenance and procedure available
tradeoffs: Creates a new evidence object, not original bytes
known_failure_modes: Conflating rerun with exact recovery
workaround_or_alternative: Preserve historical loss record; label rerun independently

capability: Private repository discovery and read operations through connector
conditions: Connected installation has resource access
best_fit: Remote source inspection and project state discovery
tradeoffs: Connector/API semantics differ from local clone
known_failure_modes: Assuming shell git credentials exist
workaround_or_alternative: Use connector for remote API reads; inspect actual tool surface

capability: Text file create/update/delete through GitHub connector
conditions: Repository write access; current blob SHA for update/delete
tradeoffs: Per-file Contents API can create noisy history
known_failure_modes: Many sequential file commits for structural refactor
workaround_or_alternative: Use low-level tree/commit path when available; squash PR

capability: Branch creation, ref movement, compare, PR, merge
conditions: Test repository and connector surface
tradeoffs: Default-branch direct mutation can be safety-blocked
known_failure_modes: Direct main ref update blocked in tested path
workaround_or_alternative: Feature branch → PR → squash merge

capability: Direct GitHub Release creation through observed connector surface
conditions: Private repo access and admin permission were confirmed
tradeoffs: Provider support does not imply connector action availability
known_failure_modes: Treating missing action as permission failure
workaround_or_alternative: Recheck current connector surface; manual/external publication; validated automation path

capability: GitHub Actions-mediated Release publication
conditions: Requires workflow plus trigger available through connector-supported mutation
tradeoffs: Workflow/token/trigger design unvalidated
known_failure_modes: No direct workflow_dispatch action observed; no existing workflow in probe repo
workaround_or_alternative: Design push-triggered release workflow and test end-to-end before relying on it

capability: Immediate durable backup before curation
conditions: Google Drive connector path and chunking workflow
best_fit: Protect valuable experiment raw input/output quickly
tradeoffs: Drive folder organization and duplicate management required
known_failure_modes: Waiting for final docs/Release before backing up
workaround_or_alternative: Compact checkpoint immediately; full archive later; round-trip verify

capability: Curated public Release publication
conditions: Requires redistribution review and supported publication path
tradeoffs: License review; connector capability may be absent
known_failure_modes: Equating durable backup with publishability
workaround_or_alternative: Separate preservation readiness from publication readiness

capability: Approximate chronology reconstruction from artifact metadata and session context
conditions: Relevant File Library objects and session-level context available
tradeoffs: Not exact message-level wall-clock history
known_failure_modes: Treating object timestamps as source file mtimes
workaround_or_alternative: Combine object timestamps, session timestamps, semantic ordering

capability: Exact enumeration/recovery of all historical conversations and turns
conditions: No conversation object search/list/get surface observed
tradeoffs: Context is partial and non-enumerable
known_failure_modes: Assuming selected context equals complete history
workaround_or_alternative: Preserve project state in repo and explicit evidence artifacts

capability: Session sandbox as universal execution location
conditions: Only selected CPU/native/scientific workloads tested
tradeoffs: Can overfit workflow to one runtime
known_failure_modes: Forcing GPU, GUI, HPC, or high-memory workloads into sandbox
workaround_or_alternative: Choose hybrid topology based on workload and durability needs

capability: Hybrid topology: sandbox + Git + Drive + external compute
conditions: Individual components partly verified; external compute integration not tested end-to-end
best_fit: Research workflows mixing coding, evidence preservation, and heavy compute
tradeoffs: More handoff boundaries to manage
known_failure_modes: Unclear source-of-truth and artifact direction
workaround_or_alternative: Define source, execution, checkpoint, artifact, and publication paths explicitly
